criteria_results.criterion: Clicking a step node inside a section opens Step Details panel (not Section Details)
criteria_results.evidence: Clicked step node 'Test Regression Step' (ref=e142, data-testid rf__node step) inside section 'New Section'. Step Details panel appeared with heading 'Step Details', name field showing 'Test Regression Step', status buttons, maturity scores. Section Details panel did NOT appear.

criteria_results.criterion: Clicking on the section background (empty area) still opens Section Details panel
criteria_results.evidence: After closing step panel, clicked section node group (rf__node-section-ebced8a9). Section Details panel appeared with heading 'Section Details', name field 'New Section', Save as Template/Run as Checklist/Delete Section actions.

criteria_results.criterion: Section name label, annotation dots, and comment/task badges remain clickable
criteria_results.evidence: Section label text 'New Section' (ref=e134) is visible in accessibility tree as interactive. The section detail panel opened via section click confirms interactive child elements are accessible. Budget constraints prevented individual element click verification.

criteria_results.criterion: Step nodes outside sections remain clickable
criteria_results.evidence: No steps outside sections present in current test workspace canvas. Could not verify. Non-blocking — the fix is pointer-events on section container only, not global.

criteria_results.criterion: Spend Summary card shows all 3 status rows: Active, Considering, Cancelled — always visible
criteria_results.evidence: Tool Analysis view at /tools shows Spend Summary card with 5 child elements: Monthly Total $0, Annual Total $0, Active $0/mo, Considering $0/mo, Cancelled $0/mo. All 3 status rows present with no tools in workspace.

criteria_results.criterion: Cancelled row shows $0/mo when no cancelled tools exist
criteria_results.evidence: Cancelled row visible with value '$0/mo' (ref=e187). Workspace has 0 tools of any status.

criteria_results.criterion: Cancelled row shows correct total when cancelled tools exist
criteria_results.evidence: No cancelled tools exist in test workspace to verify. Deferred — conditional wrapper removal ensures row renders unconditionally; arithmetic logic is unchanged.

criteria_results.criterion: npx supabase db push succeeds without errors
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_3.json status=failed. Supabase CLI unauthenticated on this machine. 'npx supabase link' returned Unauthorized. Migration not pushed. Manual fix required: npx supabase login → supabase link → supabase db push.

Console errors on canvas after clicking step: 'Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500' for /api/v1/step-tools?step_id=bc4e8a75-dae3-4672-81e0-11df132e9312. Migration not applied, table does not exist.

criteria_results.criterion: step_tools table exists in remote Supabase schema
criteria_results.evidence: Step-tools API returns 500 confirming table does not exist. Migration blocked.

criteria_results.criterion: TypeScript compiles clean (no code changes expected)
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_3.json reports typecheck.status=pass (no code changes made).

bugs_found.description: step-tools API returns 500 when step detail panel opens. Network request to /api/v1/step-tools?step_id=... fails with 500 because migration 024_step_tools.sql was never pushed to remote Supabase. Two console errors appear every time a step is clicked.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Navigate to workspace canvas. 2. Click any step node. 3. Step Details panel opens. 4. Console shows: 'Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 500' for /api/v1/step-tools?step_id={id}.

improvements_found.observation: Spend Summary card has no visual hierarchy separating the totals (Monthly/Annual) from the status breakdown (Active/Considering/Cancelled). Adding a subtle divider or sub-label 'By Status' above the 3 status rows would improve scannability.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H6: Recognition over recall — grouping related values reduces cognitive load
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add a small 'By Status' label above the Active/Considering/Cancelled rows, matching the 'By Status' label already used in the Tools Summary sidebar panel.

improvements_found.observation: Step Details panel shows 'No tools defined yet. Go to Tools →' but tools CAN be defined (the step-tools feature exists). The message implies tools must be configured workspace-globally before assignment, which may confuse users expecting to add tools per-step.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status — user should understand what state the system is in
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Change copy to 'No tools assigned. Assign from Tools page →' to clarify the action required.
